Problems: Flask app not reloading after code changes during development
Solutions: Set debug=True in app.run() and FLASK_ENV=development so the server restarts automatically whenever a file changes.

Problems: CORS error when calling my API from a separate frontend
Solutions: Installed flask-cors and added CORS(app). The browser stopped blocking cross-origin requests.

Problems: Low engagement on social posts at certain times
Solutions: Tested different posting times, used stronger visuals, and added a few relevant hashtags. Engagement improved once I posted when my audience was actually online.

Problems: Bread came out too dense every time
Solutions: The yeast was old. Proofed fresh yeast in warm water first, kneaded longer to build gluten, and let it rise until doubled for a much lighter loaf.
